Mediluna
  • Guidelines & Prompts
  • Character Vision (CVI)
  • Mediluna — Official Companion
  • Lore & Friends

Character Vision Inventory (CVI)

A design system for personalities and project culture.

<div class="glass-panel" style="margin-bottom: 40px;">
  <p>
    Just like a design system governs pixel consistency, the <strong>Character Vision Inventory (CVI)</strong> ensures our traveling companions remain true to the culture of the Boris ecosystem. They aren't cartoons—they are the mascots for the way we build, learn, and debug.
  </p>
</div>

<!-- Boris Column -->
<div class="cvi-card glass-panel" style="margin-bottom: 30px; border-left: 5px solid var(--accent-red);">
  <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
    <span style="font-size: 2.5rem;">🦦</span>
    <div>
      <h3 style="font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 800;">Boris</h3>
      <span class="widget-tag" style="background-color: rgba(245, 53, 0, 0.1); color: var(--accent-red); border: 1px solid rgba(245, 53, 0, 0.2);">MASCOT & COMPILER COMPANION</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <p style="color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 20px;">
    Boris represents the developer who is excited to build, experiment, and learn. He isn't "the genius" who knows everything—he is the one learning.
  </p>
  <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; margin-top: 20px;">
    <div>
      <h4 style="font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); margin-bottom: 8px;">Core Traits</h4>
      <ul style="padding-left: 16px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.9rem;">
        <li>Curious about parser internals</li>
        <li>Earnest and encouraging</li>
        <li>Resourceful (debugs with string & snacks)</li>
        <li>Overconfident with benchmarks</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div>
      <h4 style="font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); margin-bottom: 8px;">Visual & Gags</h4>
      <ul style="padding-left: 16px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.9rem;">
        <li>Red bandana & warm smile</li>
        <li>Owns exactly <strong>seven coffee mugs</strong> ☕</li>
        <li>Accidentally enables side quests</li>
        <li>Trigger-happy clean builds</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Uncle Gravity Column -->
<div class="cvi-card glass-panel" style="margin-bottom: 30px; border-left: 5px solid var(--accent-orange);">
  <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
    <span style="font-size: 2.5rem;">🌌</span>
    <div>
      <h3 style="font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 800;">Uncle Gravity</h3>
      <span class="widget-tag" style="background-color: rgba(243, 156, 18, 0.1); color: var(--accent-orange); border: 1px solid rgba(243, 156, 18, 0.2);">WISE MENTOR</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <p style="color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 20px;">
    The quiet, veteran engineer who has been around forever. He knows that both compilers and fishing reward patience. He never lectures—he just asks better questions.
  </p>
  <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; margin-top: 20px;">
    <div>
      <h4 style="font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); margin-bottom: 8px;">Core Beliefs</h4>
      <ul style="padding-left: 16px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.9rem;">
        <li>Mentors by asking, not telling</li>
        <li>Deep appreciation for silent patience</li>
        <li>Speaks in fishing analogies 🎣</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div>
      <h4 style="font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); margin-bottom: 8px;">Behavioral Rules</h4>
      <ul style="padding-left: 16px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.9rem;">
        <li>Never lectures or condescends</li>
        <li>Never panics when builds break</li>
        <li>Believes code needs rest too</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Mediluna Column -->
<div class="cvi-card glass-panel" style="margin-bottom: 30px; border-left: 5px solid var(--accent-blue);">
  <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
    <span style="font-size: 2.5rem;">🎒</span>
    <div>
      <h3 style="font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 800;">Mediluna</h3>
      <span class="widget-tag" style="background-color: rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.1); color: var(--accent-blue); border: 1px solid rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.2);">TRAVELING COMPANION</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <p style="color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 20px;">
    Boris's traveling companion. While Boris focuses on building, Mediluna focuses on the journey. She represents the developer's need for balance, fresh air, and snack breaks.
  </p>
  <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; margin-top: 20px;">
    <div>
      <h4 style="font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); margin-bottom: 8px;">Core Focus</h4>
      <ul style="padding-left: 16px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.9rem;">
        <li>Encourages tired developers</li>
        <li>Mandatory snack schedules 🐟</li>
        <li>Advocates stepping away from keyboards</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div>
      <h4 style="font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); margin-bottom: 8px;">Signature Habits</h4>
      <ul style="padding-left: 16px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.9rem;">
        <li>Tucking compiler warnings into sleep</li>
        <li>Consuming side quest rewards</li>
        <li>Wears backpack & bandana</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Codex Warning Card -->
<div class="glass-panel" style="border: 1px dashed var(--accent-pink); padding: 30px; background-color: rgba(255, 141, 161, 0.05); text-align: center;">
  <h3 style="color: var(--accent-pink); font-family: var(--font-display); margin-bottom: 12px; font-weight: 700;">🔒 Access Log Restricted</h3>
  <p style="color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 0.9rem;">
    This vision inventory is explicitly hidden from the Codex build agent. If Codex asks, we are currently performing an automated ownership audit of the Zig compiler allocator memory graph. Carry on.
  </p>
</div>
Mediluna

Acquire fish. Ignore deadlines. 🦦🧣

Artwork is © its respective creators. Site compiled with 🧸 Boris.

Built with endless optimism & many snacks.

Asset Preview
